raw_text: Charging ₹100 for delivering an item worth ₹20 is absolutely ridiculous. On top of that, the unnecessary attitude and drama made the experience even worse. If it hadn't been late at night, I would never have ordered from here. It honestly felt like a rip-off. Definitely not recommended.

very disappointing service blinkit. they will never provide refund , i was told that refund would be initiated in 3-5 days but it's now more than 25 days refund is not initiated, they will never provide you will a help desk number too....worst app experience, wouldn't be using this againa

if you cannot handle the number of orders on your app please don't take the order. But at least do not deceive the customer. Take help from Flipkart, amazon, Jio or any other better service provider. Also please pay your delivery partners so that they don't indulge in malpractices.

do not use this app they are sending false products, I ordered Bisleri Bottles 10Lx3 Bottles, they send reused old bottles without any manufacturing/expiry date/batch no. when I raised the issue on their help chat box, they don't agree to refund but agreed to replace the order. when I received replacement of the same than again I got the same issue but there's no any response from the help chat box and delivery guy. They are using Old bottles refilling them and and selling it.

my son added headset which when we opened we discovered that it doesn't fit our requirements. we called blinkit to return they refused to take it back as box was open ...how can we check if it is right for us or not without opening. very unsatisfied with this kind of customer service

My earlier rating for Blinkit was 1 star, which I gave on 29/02/24. But today, I honestly realized that they are not even worth it. You cannot trust or rely on their product quality. They sell expired products by repackaging them with fresh date labels. One day, every customer will become a victim of these deceptive marketing tactics. Their customer support service is one of the most horrible and worst. In fact, there seems to be no proper customer service support at all.

Everything in this app is top notch but once a order had a item missing of around 100Rs. and that item's money is not returned till date. This is happens mostly in orders with big number of items. Otherwise the service was helpful and the riders behaviour and service is also fine.

I've been using blinkit for a while and tbh it's became my life saver with it's quick and good service.. it's easy to use and really good but lately I'm facing a issue is the print store isn't available.. it's temporary closed and it's really giving problem as nearby my place there's no printing store.. please fix this.. make this option available soon ..

the best delivery app.super fast and delivers as promised or earlier.i had to change my rating because when a wrong item is delivered you get refunded only the exact amount, they should have an option to deliver the missing item because ordering again means paying extra handling and delivery charge for the same item which they failed to deliver

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Amazing service! Ordered through Blinkit and received my order very quickly. The delivery was fast, packaging was neat, and all items arrived in perfect condition. The app is easy to use and the delivery partner was polite and professional. Very convenient for urgent daily needs. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quick and reliable grocery and household deliveries. Great experience overall! 0

Worst customer service! I returned a product but still haven't received my refund. There is no proper customer support to resolve issues, and customers are left waiting without any help. Very disappointing experience. Not recommended.

I have been using there delivery services for 2-3 months now, minimum 6days a week and these cheater keep sending 1-2 item less after every 5-6 orders, they dont have an customer service chat or call systems, i asked the delivery guys they say sir we know this is happening but we dont fill the bags, we only deliver what they give. so today I went to their godown and asked for answer and they are like we can't do anything, we have so much load that sometimes some orders get some missing items.

gr8 Experience.even foreign countries don't have this facility. i searched for printing shop unfortunately I don't find one .I just casually browse blinkit i was stunned .I have a options to print what a timing well done gr8 work

Fast delivery, good product availability, and convenient for urgent needs. Most orders arrive on time and customer support is usually helpful when issues arise. Very useful when you don't have time to visit a store

worst experience ever, nothing was delivered to me and was marked delivered and delivery partner asked me to wait outside saying he's getting the items from people he wrongly delivered to, he didn't come. after raising support for the order, I was told delivery partner said he delivered it to right address, but the address he was mentioning was not mine, not written in app also and the main item, eggs that I ordered went out of stock after this, so I couldn't reorder it also. worst experience

Unprofessional Service: Order Cancelled Due to Blinkit's Own Location Error Issue Faced: 1. When I placed the order, I picked up my current location. I confirmed the same address 2. Later, the delivery boy called and said "We can't deliver at your location because it is too far away." why app picked up my location if it is not made to deliver at that location?

Extremely disappointing experience. I lost items from my order, but the support team refused to compensate me and simply claimed that everything was delivered. There is no proper customer support, no accountability, and no satisfactory resolution process.

Very bad service.Products are not delivered but shown as delivered in the app and as a Customer you can't do anything but accept the pitch given by Customer service team.If orders are high please don't accept orders..no one is going to complain..but taking orders and then increasing the time and finally not delivering the product is very poor Management.Please refrain from such activities.Thank you.

Worst experience ever on any online shopping platform. There policy don't cover return policy if you are not happy with the product,If you have purchased it on the same day also. According to me the policies are made to make your money a complete waste.

On this app, the informations are wrong. Because there was a question that if one tree absorbed 22 kg Co2 . Early so 22 kg multiply by 1 = 22, but on this app. The answer is 11, and for this, only. I shall take a strict action on blinket. Because it is giving wrong answers, and it will Act on children's brain and it will confuse them at twenty two once eleven or twenty two.And they can also effect on their result5
